targets.notes: By FY25 and annually thereafter, achieve and maintain 100% renewable electricity for our operations and data centers; procure renewable energy from sources that create additionality when available and commercially reasonable.
targets.title: Scope 1 and 2: 100% renewable electricity by FY25

targets.boundary: Manufacturing suppliers in Scope 3 Category 1 (Purchased Goods and Services)
targets.notes: By FY26, engage manufacturing suppliers comprising at least 67% of Scope 3 Category 1 GHG emissions with the goal of supplier adoption of science-based targets aligned with limiting temperature rise to 1.5 degrees Celsius.
targets.title: Scope 3 Category 1 supplier engagement: ≥67% by FY26
